name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect validation behavior or a crash

---

DESCRIPTION

A clear summary of the bug.

MANIFEST INPUT

```json
{
  "manifest_version": 3,
  "name": "Example",
  "version": "1.0.0"
}
```

EXPECTED BEHAVIOR

What you expected to happen.

ACTUAL BEHAVIOR

What actually happened. Include the full output or error message.

ENVIRONMENT

- crx-manifest-validator version
- Node.js version
- Operating system
